title: BasicallyStopwatch
description: A simple mod adding a stopwatch/timer to your HUD
body:
A simple mod adding a stopwatch/timer to your HUD

the position of the timer can be configured
the color of the text can also be configured

the mod adds 2 new keybinds
- Toggle/Reset
- Pause/Resume
> the functionality of the keys is fairly self-explanatory

if one of the keys is pressed while holding `Left Alt` the current time will be copied to your clipboard
